Off Calendar Nov-24-2025 Continued To Jan-14-26 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MOTION TO QUASH SUBPOENAS
Off Calendar Nov-18-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF IAN MCDONALD MOTION TO QUASH SUBPOENAS

Appearances (by Zoom):
Norelle Miranda, Esq. 213-291-7791 Shegerian & Associates for Plaintiff.
Shaida Shahinfar, Esq. O'Hagan Meyer512-574-3502 for Defendant.

Parties state appearance. The Court announces the tentative ruling. The Court states a timely notice of contest the TR was received from Plaintiff.

ARGUED. The court states a tentative ruling with strike throughs was sent by the clerk at 8:44am to the parties by email. Parties confirm receipt. Ms. Miranda present arguments; overrules privacy objections. Ms. Shahinafar responds; half of the cases referenced do not deal with privacy and only 2 cases are relevant. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

PLAINTIFF IAN MCDONALD's MOTION TO QUASH SUBPOENAS.

Plaintiff Ian McDonald's Motion to Quash Subpoenas.

Taken Under Submission.***

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)

***After the hearing, the court signs an order. (see scanned order for details)***
